title: Beautify Craft
body:
# Beautify Craft

**Beautify Craft** is a curated Minecraft modpack focused on transforming the game's visual experience. It adds high-quality textures, fluid animations, and stunning shaders to bring your world to life like never before.


![Screenshot with shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bff2b97711dc5e9ad9eb63d0750e3eb5b6f19604.jpeg)
![Screenshot with shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5801a760b0583475dd21efc8e0a87721b929c37.png)


## ✨ Features

- Adds smooth character and environmental animations  
- Integrates realistic shaders for dynamic lighting, shadows, and reflections  

## 🎯 Why You’ll Love It

- Perfect for players who want a more immersive and cinematic Minecraft experience  
- Enhances both single-player and multiplayer gameplay without altering core mechanics  
- Ideal for content creators, builders, and casual players who value aesthetics
